name: Vegetable Biriyani
recipeIngredient: 1 cup steamed vegetables (green peas, beans, carrots, cauliflower, etc.)
2 tablespoons cashew nuts or slivered almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the Basmati rice and soak in water for 30 minutes. Drain well.
2. Melt 1 1/2 tablespoons butter in a skillet and sauté onions until golden brown. Remove from heat.
3. In another part of the skillet, add the remaining butter and cook the rice until it separates into grains.
4. Add all spices (turmeric, cinnamon, clove, nutmeg, chili, coriander) and mix well.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
6. Transfer the cooked rice mixture to a baking dish.
7. Add salt and 1 1/2 cups water to the rice.
8. Cook for 20 minutes or until fully done.
9. Mix in the steamed vegetables, chopped onions, raisins, and cashew nuts.
